introSection: Kiddie Coaster was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Codona's Amusement Park in Aberdeen, Scotland, UK. It had blue track, white supports, and a white train.

sections.title: External links
sections.content:
* Article with an iamge of the coaster
 * Image containing the coaster on the National Fairground Archive

fullText:
Kiddie Coaster was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Codona's Amusement Park in Aberdeen, Scotland, UK. It had blue track, white supports, and a white train.


 * Article with an iamge of the coaster
 * Image containing the coaster on the National Fairground Archive
